message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to core modules

Apply consistent rustfmt formatting across beta_feedback_loop,
fleet_memory_controller, and robot_ntm_surface modules. Changes
are formatting-only: line wrapping for long assert_eq!/assert!
chains, struct initializer spacing, match arm formatting, and
closure argument alignment.

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
